watch.summary: Applied Atomics has emerged from Stealth Mode with more than $500 million in demand commitments to build the Star Reacher network. The Star Reacher Network is a mobility infrastructure layer [] The post Applied Atomics Emerges from Stealth with Enough Backing to Build Star Reacher Network appeared first on Via Satellite .

watch.title: UAE’s EDGE Group launches European arm out of Paris
watch.summary: EDGE Europe will have two sites: a head office in Chaillot in central Paris focusing on government interactions and investments, and a manufacturing site in Bordeaux for design, integration and development of platforms, per the companys statement.

watch.title: Orbital Raises $5M Pre-Seed to Build ODC Constellation
watch.summary: Orbital’s ODC concept instead relies on a network of relatively smaller satellites, which can together handle large AI inference workloads, and remain in constant contact with the ground. The post Orbital Raises $5M Pre-Seed to Build ODC Constellation appeared first on Payload .
